It reported $753K in revenue for its most recent fiscal year, up 142% year-over-year, with a net loss of $234K. Reported cash ($69K) is below its annual loss ($234K), so this raise materially affects its runway.
flags: Cash on hand covers less than half the most recent annual loss.
Issuer pays 4.9% of the amount raised to Picmii Crowdfunding.

deals.name: TheFirehouseDetroit

deals.summary: TheFirehouseDetroit, based in Detroit, MI, is raising up to $800K in loan notes on Nssc Funding Portal. The company reported no revenue for its most recent fiscal year. Reported cash ($2K) is below its annual loss ($4K), so this raise materially affects its runway.
flags: Pre-revenue: no sales reported in the most recent fiscal year.
Cash on hand covers less than half the most recent annual loss.
Issuer pays 5% of the amount raised to Nssc Funding Portal.

The company reported no revenue for its most recent fiscal year. Reported cash ($1K) is below its annual loss ($1K), so this raise materially affects its runway.

deals.name: 5 Generation Bakers
deals.fees: Applied at marginal rate based upon amount of total offering: up to $100,000 = 8.5%, $100,001+ = 7.5%. $500 Platform Fee. 3% investment fee capped at $75. Credit Card: 5.5% + $2; A Loan Servicing Fee of .25% assessed monthly.
deals.summary: 5 Generation Bakers, based in Mckees Rocks, PA, is raising up to $618K in loan notes on Honeycomb. It reported $9.0M in revenue for its most recent fiscal year, up 53% year-over-year, with a net loss of $4K.
flags: Issuer pays 8.5% of the amount raised plus setup/monthly fees to Honeycomb.
